title: Custom Totem Pop Template
description: This Is a simple template for a custom totem pop sound.
body:
This Resourcepack/**Soundpack** is a template for a custom totem pop **sound**. I changed the default sound to a simple 'bruh' soundeffect. You can change the soundeffect to whatever you like, just make sure you follow these instructions:

1. Head over to your .minecraft folder.

2. Go to Resourcepacks > CustomTotemPop_Template > assets > minecraft > sounds > totem

3. Download whatever sound you like from the internet and convert the mp3 file to a .ogg file using a online converter. It is important to convert it and not rename the file.

4. Rename the .ogg file to 'use_totem.ogg' and replace it with the default file in the sounds folder in the resourcepack.
